data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Adobe employs strong encryption protocols to secure data in transit and at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhancing security by requiring multiple forms of verification for access.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication using SMS and authenticator apps.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Use of AI and machine learning for early threat detection and response.
data.technical_spec: Integration of SIEM and UEBA technologies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducting frequent security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and external audits using industry-standard tools.

data.title: Patch Management
data.description: Timely updates and patches to fix vulnerabilities in software and systems.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management using internal systems.
